common_prefixes.description: A list of common prefixes (like folder paths) found in the specified S3 bucket.

id.description: A unique identifier for the set of S3 objects being referenced.

keys.description: A list of keys (object names) within the specified S3 bucket.

owners.description: A list of owners associated with the S3 objects, indicating who owns each object.

request_charged.description: Indicates if the request to access the S3 objects was charged, typically 'requester' if the requester pays for the request.
